metadata.description: Top 50 Q&A pairs for Rubenius chatbot, generated from full website scan

qa_pairs.question: What is Rubenius?
qa_pairs.answer: Rubenius is a leading experience and workspace design firm based in Bengaluru, India. Founded in 2005, they are known as 'The Interior Wellbeing Co.' Their mission is to enrich lives through honest design by creating healthy, happy, and balanced work and living environments. They are a commercial design and fabrication studio with over 20 years in the business.

qa_pairs.question: When was Rubenius founded?
qa_pairs.answer: Rubenius was founded in 2005. The company has been in business for over 20 years, delivering bespoke interior solutions for commercial workspaces, F&B, and residential properties.

qa_pairs.question: What does 'Interior Wellbeing' mean at Rubenius?
qa_pairs.answer: Interior Wellbeing is Rubenius's core philosophy that guides all their thinking and actions. It is built on four pillars: Wellbeing (balanced lifestyle for health and happiness), Sustainability (reducing energy and material waste), Design (spaces that inspire human interaction), and Technology (digital transformation of spaces for highly integrated experiences). Every project at Rubenius is rooted in these four pillars.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the founder of Rubenius?
qa_pairs.answer: Rubenius was founded by Rajesh Kumar Das, who serves as the Director of the company. The leadership team also includes Ashok (Head of Operations) and Nebin (Creative Head).

qa_pairs.question: How many projects has Rubenius completed?
qa_pairs.answer: Rubenius has completed 330+ projects across commercial, retail, hospitality, healthcare, and residential sectors. They also report a 70% repeat business rate, reflecting high client satisfaction.

qa_pairs.question: How large is the Rubenius team?
qa_pairs.answer: Rubenius has a team of 24+ in-house members covering roles including design, architecture, engineering, sourcing, project management, HR, and digital strategy. Key team members include designers, site engineers, a creative head, procurement manager, and digital strategist.

qa_pairs.question: Where is Rubenius located?
qa_pairs.answer:
Rubenius has two office locations:
1. Bengaluru (HQ): No. 10, 2nd Cross, 5th Main Rd, P.R.S. Layout Banaswadi, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560043
2. Bhubaneswar: Plot No. 714, 745, Nandankanan Road, At/PO. Raghunathpur, Bhubaneswar, Odisha - 751024

qa_pairs.question: How can I contact Rubenius to start a project?
qa_pairs.answer:
To start a project with Rubenius, you can:
- Email: rajesh@rubenius.in
- Call: +91 99000 11879
For general enquiries:
- Email: info@rubenius.in
- Call: +91 86608 42682
You can also visit https://www.rubenius.in/start-a-project to initiate a project online.

qa_pairs.question: How can I reach Rubenius for supplier inquiries?
qa_pairs.answer:
For becoming a supplier with Rubenius, you can contact:
- Email: dibyani@rubenius.in
- Call: +91 90353 24025

qa_pairs.question: How can I apply for a job at Rubenius?
qa_pairs.answer:
For career opportunities at Rubenius, you can contact:
- Email: Prathiba@rubenius.in
- Call: +91 80886 23921
You can also visit the Careers page at https://www.rubenius.in/careers

qa_pairs.question: What services does Rubenius offer?
qa_pairs.answer:
Rubenius offers the following integrated design and build services:
1. Design & Build – Full in-house design, visualisation, procurement, and delivery
2. Detail & Build – Storytelling through structured spatial experiences
3. Workplace Consultancy – Space analysis, heat mapping, and design briefing
4. Furniture – Custom and bespoke furniture design and integration
5. Refurbishment – Renovation and layout changes for existing spaces
6. Aftercare – Post-delivery support, minor amendments, and repeat client services
7. Sustainability Initiatives – Reducing energy and material waste in projects

qa_pairs.question: What is the Design & Build service at Rubenius?
qa_pairs.answer:
The Design & Build service is Rubenius's flagship offering where their in-house design team handles all aspects of a project — from procurement and delivery to furniture, visualisation, and design. The process has four stages:
1. Brief & Discovery – Understanding client culture, philosophy, and user needs
2. Design & Development – Creating visuals, drawings, and designs
3. Pre-Construction – Finalising budget, revisions, and specifications
4. Build – Full execution with a dedicated project manager and timeline

qa_pairs.question: What does Rubenius's Workplace Consultancy service involve?
qa_pairs.answer:
The Workplace Consultancy service helps clients understand how their current space is being used. The process includes:
1. Define the Brief – Clarifying goals and what the data should answer
2. Data Collection – Using digital and traditional methods, heat maps, and observational studies
3. Data Presentation – Clear graphics and graphs for all stakeholders
4. Design Development – Applying findings to develop design direction
This service is available in-house for smaller projects and with specialist consultants for complex ones.

qa_pairs.question: What is the Aftercare service at Rubenius?
qa_pairs.answer:
Aftercare at Rubenius is a dedicated post-delivery support service that ensures long-term client satisfaction. It includes:
1. Handover – Aftercare team is introduced during construction for a smooth transition
2. Refurbishments – Managing small works like redecorating or complete layout changes
3. Relationship – Ongoing advice, industry updates, and design adjustments
4. Repeat Clients – Assistance when transitioning to new office spaces and furniture refurbishment
Rubenius offers round-the-clock service for occupied spaces with minimal business disruption.

qa_pairs.question: Does Rubenius provide furniture solutions?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Rubenius offers a dedicated Furniture service as part of their integrated offering. They provide bespoke interior décor, custom-made fashion-forward furniture, collectibles, and accessories tailored to express your brand or lifestyle. Furniture design, specification, and integration are considered together with the interior design scheme for aesthetic synergy.

qa_pairs.question: Does Rubenius handle refurbishment projects?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Rubenius offers a Refurbishment service that covers renovation of commercial and retail spaces, layout changes, and workspace upgrades. They recognise the importance of maintaining business as usual with minimal disruption to existing occupants during refurbishments.

qa_pairs.question: What does Rubenius's Detail & Build service focus on?
qa_pairs.answer: The Detail & Build service focuses on spatial storytelling — guiding visitors through a clear narrative journey within a space. It involves structured experiences where spaces communicate meaning and guide people through brand or organisational stories. This service is closely tied to experience center design.

qa_pairs.question: What types of spaces does Rubenius design?
qa_pairs.answer:
Rubenius designs a wide range of spaces including:
- Office & Corporate Interiors
- Experience Centers
- Co-working Spaces
- Hospitality (Hotels, Resorts)
- F&B (Restaurants, Bars, Cafes)
- Healthcare (Hospitals, Labs)
- Retail & Shopping Spaces
- Institutional & Educational Spaces
- VVIP Terminals & Public Spaces
- Residential & Villa Interiors
- Warehouses

qa_pairs.question: Has Rubenius worked on experience centers?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, designing Experience Centers is one of Rubenius's core specialisations. Notable experience center projects include the Schneider Electric R&D Experience Centre, the VSSC ISRO Dreamverse Tech Experience Center, the Scaler School of Business and Technology, Kewaunee Laboratory Solutions, and the Rajiv Gandhi VVIP Terminal in Hyderabad. They use experiential design to help brands showcase their vision of the future.

qa_pairs.question: Has Rubenius worked on government projects?
qa_pairs.answer:
Yes, Rubenius has worked on government projects including:
- BESCOM (Bangalore Electricity Supply Company) – Helped reinvent its brand image through experiential spatial design
- Rajiv Gandhi VVIP Terminal, Hyderabad – Designed an elegant VVIP lounge incorporating Biophilia
- VSSC ISRO (Indian Space Research Organisation) – Designed the Dreamverse Tech Experience Center

qa_pairs.question: Does Rubenius design hospitality spaces like hotels?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Rubenius has designed hospitality spaces. A notable example is Velvette Hotels, where they breathed new life into an existing structure and increased footfalls. They apply their Interior Wellbeing philosophy to create immersive and commercially successful hospitality environments.

qa_pairs.question: Has Rubenius worked on healthcare interiors?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Rubenius has worked on healthcare interiors. A notable project is Hosmat Hospitals, where they used spatial design to build brand equity and improve the patient and visitor experience. They have also worked with The Nairobi South Hospital in Kenya.

qa_pairs.question: Has Rubenius done F&B (restaurant / bar / café) projects?
qa_pairs.answer:
Yes, Rubenius has designed several F&B spaces including:
- LS Night (Restobar) – Inspired by streets, raised the bar for F&B design
- Rasa Restaurant – Used furniture to define an authentic culinary experience
- Divyasree Chamber Café – Blended tradition with contemporary design, creating an inviting atmosphere
They bring storytelling and biophilia into F&B environments.

qa_pairs.question: Does Rubenius design laboratory interiors?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Rubenius has experience in laboratory interior design. A major project is Kewaunee International Group, for which they innovated laboratory solutions for a safer and smarter future. They also have expertise in lab interior design as one of their niche capabilities.

qa_pairs.question: Who are some of Rubenius's notable clients?
qa_pairs.answer:
Rubenius has worked with 150+ businesses including:
- Schneider Electric
- 3M
- Hewlett Packard (HP)
- Piramal
- PVR Cinemas
- POSCO
- Stäubli
- BESCOM
- Hosmat Hospitals
- OYO
- Cult.fit
- Capitaland Singapore
- Panduit
- Prestige Group
- House of Commons
- Velvette Hotels
- Nairobi South Hospital
- Scaler School
- VSSC ISRO
- Kewaunee International Group

qa_pairs.question: What did Schneider Electric say about Rubenius?
qa_pairs.answer: Vikas Srivastava, Head of Administration & Facility at Schneider Electric's R&D Center, said: 'Rubenius is an expert on experiential design. Our simulations to showcase our vision of the future was executed just the way we envisioned it. The team went beyond what was necessary to work within the budget.' Rubenius designed Schneider Electric's Experience Centre using experiential and futuristic design techniques.

qa_pairs.question: Does Rubenius serve startups or only large enterprises?
qa_pairs.answer: Rubenius serves both. Their website states: 'From some of the most world-renowned brands to adventurous start-ups, we partner with clients across all industries to deliver solutions to workspaces that are bespoke to their business and social needs.' They have worked with global corporates like HP and Schneider Electric as well as growing startups.

qa_pairs.question: Does Rubenius work on international projects?
qa_pairs.answer:
Yes, Rubenius has a global outreach. Through their partnership programmes with associated architects globally, they have collaborated on and delivered projects across:
- DRC Congo
- Nairobi, Kenya
- Mombasa, Kenya
- Dubai, UAE
- Singapore
- Amsterdam, Netherlands
- Pan-India
They are actively expanding their presence, especially in Dubai and the Middle East.

qa_pairs.question: Is Rubenius expanding to Dubai?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Rubenius is actively positioning itself in Dubai and the Middle East market. They have published insights on performance-driven experience centers for Dubai brands and are known to take on projects in the UAE. Their approach focuses on how spatial design can influence customer decisions and brand value for Dubai-based businesses.

qa_pairs.question: What is Rubenius's approach to sustainability?
qa_pairs.answer: Rubenius goes beyond sustainability labels by zeroing in on reducing energy and material waste in every project. Sustainability is one of the four core pillars of their Interior Wellbeing philosophy. They strive to reduce the impact of projects on the community and environment. They have won multiple Nispana Innovative Awards for Sustainable Smart Cities Innovations and were recognised by the Economic Times as a Top 5 Smart Green Workplace designer.

qa_pairs.question: How does Rubenius incorporate technology into spaces?
qa_pairs.answer: Technology is one of Rubenius's four core design pillars. They enable digital transformation of spaces to create highly integrated experiences. This includes interactive displays, simulation environments, digital systems that enhance engagement and accessibility, and technology-enabled branded workspaces. They constantly research and apply the most recent technology, both in initial design and Day 2 (aftercare) work.

qa_pairs.question: What is biophilic design and does Rubenius use it?
qa_pairs.answer: Biophilic design incorporates natural elements — plants, water, natural light, and organic materials — into built environments to improve wellbeing. Yes, Rubenius uses biophilic design principles in their projects. A notable example is the Rajiv Gandhi VVIP Terminal in Hyderabad, where they incorporated biophilia into the VIP lounge. Biophilia is listed as one of their core design specialisations.

qa_pairs.question: How does Rubenius approach branded workspaces?
qa_pairs.answer:
Rubenius believes branded workspaces build brand equity. Their approach involves three dimensions:
1. Design – Creating high-quality environments that facilitate human interaction and promote better work culture
2. Partner – Integrating technology-enabled environments to increase brand value
3. Interiors – Bespoke décor, custom furniture, and accessories that reflect brand identity and lifestyle
They align spatial design with organisational vision, brand identity, and desired behaviours.

qa_pairs.question: Has Rubenius won any awards?
qa_pairs.answer:
Yes, Rubenius has won numerous industry awards across many years. Some highlights include:
- Construction Week: Interior Contractor of the Year (2023)
- IGEN: India's Top 40 Best Designer (2023)
- Spaciux Platinum Awards: Large Workspace Design (2022)
- Young Designer of the Year – Commercial Design (2022)
- FOAID Awards: Best Interior Retail – India (2018 & 2019)
- IQA Award: Excellence in Interior Designing Services (2016)
- KSMBOA Award: Excellence in Customer Satisfaction (2015)
- BID Award, Paris: Excellence in Leadership & Quality (2015)
- D'Source Design Challenge IIT Bombay: Winner (2020, 2021)
- Lexus Design Awards: Multiple years
- FOAID Bronze (2024)
- CII Top 50 Design (2024)

qa_pairs.question: Has Rubenius been featured in any publications?
qa_pairs.answer:
Yes, Rubenius has been featured in multiple publications including:
- Architect and Interiors India (Future Design, 2023)
- Architect Ideas (Customer Experience Lounge, 2023)
- Commercial Design Magazine (2022)
- Things in India – Top 20 Designers in Bangalore 2022
- Your Story – ISOPOD: Pivot and Persist (2020)
- Business Standard
- The Week
- 99 Acres
- Homify
- Archinect
- Planet Custodian

qa_pairs.question: Has Rubenius received any recognition for COVID-19 innovations?
qa_pairs.answer:
Yes, Rubenius received multiple recognitions for their COVID-19 design innovations:
- D'Source Design Challenge (IIT Bombay): Winner for 'Product Solution for Pandemic' and 'Isolation Solution for Pandemic' (2020 & 2021)
- Tech Briefs – Create the Future: Most Popular Innovation – Medical and Product Design (2020)
- Nestle India Award: Recognition for COVID Innovations (2021)
- BSI Awards: Winner for Prefab Structure (2021)
- Recognised by MHRD (Govt of India), ICO-D, WDO, and IDC School of Design IIT Mumbai for their Corona Design Challenge solutions

qa_pairs.question: How does the Rubenius design process work?
qa_pairs.answer:
The Rubenius design process for Design & Build has four key stages:
1. Brief & Discovery – Defining your vision including culture, philosophy, and user needs
2. Design & Development – Technical and creative designers create visuals, drawings, and designs aligned with functional and aesthetic requirements, including furniture specification
3. Pre-Construction – Finalising budget, revisions, and specifications with full transparency
4. Build – Execution phase with a dedicated project manager, timeline management, and regular client/contractor meetings
Communication, on-time delivery, and attention to detail are core principles throughout.

qa_pairs.question: How does Rubenius manage project budgets?
qa_pairs.answer: Rubenius designs to budget as a constant client requirement. They achieve value for money through transparency and honesty in commercial transactions, clear specifications, and regular client communication. They work to build trust and clarity for both parties, ensuring that the budget is set in stone during the Pre-Construction phase before work begins.

qa_pairs.question: Can Rubenius do virtual reality presentations of designs?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Rubenius presents designs to clients in various ways including workshopping sketches and virtual reality experiences. This is part of their Design & Development phase, ensuring clients can visualise and approve the space before construction begins.

qa_pairs.question: Does Rubenius publish any industry insights or articles?
qa_pairs.answer:
Yes, Rubenius regularly publishes thought leadership content in their Insights section at https://www.rubenius.in/insights. Recent articles include:
- 'The ROI of Experience Centers: How Brands Turn Spaces into Revenue Engines'
- 'The Psychology of Spatial Design: How Dubai Brands Can Influence Decisions Before a Word Is Spoken'
- 'Dubai Doesn't Need Another Interior Designer – Rubenius Performance-Driven Experience Centers'
- Articles on trends shaping experience center design, and comparisons of experience center vs. experiential design approaches

qa_pairs.question: Where can I follow Rubenius on social media?
qa_pairs.answer:
You can follow Rubenius on the following platforms:
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/RubeniusInt/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rubenius_interiors/
- LinkedIn: https://in.linkedin.com/company/rubeniusinteriors
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJa1fnQh9duhYEBD4VKfWKQ

qa_pairs.question: What is Rubenius's repeat business rate?
qa_pairs.answer: Rubenius has a 70% repeat business rate, which reflects the high satisfaction of their clients and the strength of their long-term relationships. This is a key metric that demonstrates trust, quality, and the effectiveness of their Aftercare and relationship-building programs.

qa_pairs.question: Does Rubenius have a partner programme for suppliers?
qa_pairs.answer:
Yes, Rubenius has a supplier and partner programme. Interested suppliers can reach out via:
- Email: dibyani@rubenius.in
- Call: +91 90353 24025
They also partner with architects globally through their partnership programmes, which has enabled them to deliver projects internationally.

qa_pairs.question: Has Rubenius designed spaces for PVR Cinemas?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Rubenius designed a space for PVR Cinemas under their Detail & Build service. The project focused on designing an experience around comfort and elegance. PVR's representative stated: 'Our spatial design is why our patrons choose us.' It is also among Rubenius's award-winning interior retail projects.

qa_pairs.question: Has Rubenius worked on educational or institutional spaces?
qa_pairs.answer:
Yes, Rubenius has worked on several educational and institutional spaces:
- Scaler School of Business – Experiential learning environment
- Scaler School of Technology, Bengaluru – Shaping the future of learning
- Vedam School of Technology – Institutional Experiential Design
These projects focus on creating environments that foster learning, collaboration, and innovation.

qa_pairs.question: Who are Rubenius's partners?
qa_pairs.answer: Rubenius's listed design partner is 10 by 10 (https://10by10.co/), a design and innovation studio. Additionally, Rubenius has global architectural partnerships that have enabled project delivery across DRC Congo, Nairobi, Mombasa, Dubai, Singapore, Amsterdam, and pan-India.

qa_pairs.question: Does Rubenius offer services for co-working space design?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, co-working space design is listed as one of Rubenius's core specialisation areas. They design co-working environments that facilitate human interaction, foster better work culture, and reflect brand identity. Their multi-disciplinary approach ensures that co-working spaces balance collaboration zones, focus areas, and social hubs.

qa_pairs.question: What is the six-pillar service framework Rubenius uses for experience center design?
qa_pairs.answer:
Rubenius frames their experience center design services around six dimensions:
1. Strategy – Aligning spatial design with organisational vision and brand identity
2. Storytelling – Creating structured narrative journeys through space
3. Technology – Digital systems for enhanced engagement and accessibility
4. Craft – Precision in materials, detailing, lighting, and construction
5. Psychology – Designing how people feel, move, and interact within a space
6. Performance – Ensuring the space effectively supports meaningful business outcomes

qa_pairs.question: Is Rubenius a design-only firm or do they also construct?
qa_pairs.answer: Rubenius is both a design and construction firm. They are described as a 'commercial design and fabrication studio.' Their integrated Design & Build and Detail & Build services cover the entire journey from concept and design through to physical construction and delivery, with an in-house team handling procurement, delivery, furniture, and visualisation.

qa_pairs.question: How do I start a project with Rubenius?
qa_pairs.answer:
To start a project with Rubenius:
1. Visit: https://www.rubenius.in/start-a-project
2. Email: rajesh@rubenius.in
3. Call: +91 99000 11879
The process begins with a Brief & Discovery session where Rubenius's team will understand your vision, culture, philosophy, and user requirements. They will then develop a tailored design direction, budget plan, and project timeline to bring your space to life.
